title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: Jeff Crume explains digital certificate expiration risks and the importance of certificate lifecycle management for enterprise security. The video covers how shorter certificate lifetimes can increase operational and security risks across websites, APIs, and infrastructure.
